content.text:
All 10 CI checks are passing and the PR is mergeable (no conflicts). 

The only review comment is from `gemini-code-assist[bot]` suggesting extracting hardcoded Catppuccin colors into a shared palette. This is a style/refactoring suggestion from a bot, not an actionable fix request from a human reviewer. It's outside the scope of this CI monitoring task (no CI failures to fix, no human review feedback to address).

PR #354 is in good shape — all checks pass, no merge conflicts, no actionable review comments.
